reviews.review_description: Waste of money for me, Cant even start it, Black screen for a couple of seconds and back to main menu
Feed the dinosaurs  in vr is a great experience

developer_response.body: Thank you for your encouragement. We will do our best to make more interesting pop-science products.

reviews.review_description: Two minutes in I knew this was a keeper. Fantastic VR experience.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your encouragement. We will do our best to make more interesting pop-science products.

reviews.review_description: The immersion is not great. The graphics are all over the place. Sometimes they're good and some times they look like a ps1 game. The dinosaurs walk like they're floating and why am I feeding them? Lol. If I saw a t-rex I wouldn't be feeding it! What are they cats? Is this a petting zoo?! "Feed the cute little fluffy t-rex? ^_^"
Great job from the creators, very informative, well made and worth every penny.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your encouragement. We will do our best to make more interesting pop-science products.

reviews.review_description: Great job they look so real

developer_response.body: Thank you for your encouragement. We will do our best to make more interesting pop-science products.

reviews.review_title: Has potential but sound choppy and lags
reviews.review_description: I would like to play through this but can't get past the sound problems. S8 plus

reviews.review_title: Ok for the price but nothing special
reviews.review_description: Don't expect state of the art graphics, there are some 1990s looking textures in there. The dinosaur models are ok but the animations need work, the dinosaurs seem to moon walk. Educationally it's about what you get from a museum or kids' books. Overall not as good as I hoped.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your comments. We will do our best to make more interesting pop-science products.

reviews.review_description: Freezes up when 341mb is reached, happened constantly. Got more than 40gig free space on galaxy s8+
The view from space is really nice and in 3D. good story telling
Very educational.. well done all involved.. decent graphics.. but story project's perfectly well ... it's a winner .. good price too

developer_response.body: Thank you for your encouragement. We will do our best to make more interesting pop-science products.
